description_long: This beer garden features an open-air pavilion with a pitched red-tiled roof supported by wooden beams and stone columns, providing shelter for several seating areas. The main structure is complemented by an adjacent open patio area, both set on a rectangular concrete base. The seating consists of wooden benches and tables, as well as cushioned lounge chairs arranged around a large central brick fireplace and grill. The fireplace, with its tall brick chimney, serves as a focal point and gathering spot. The overall layout is spacious, allowing for easy movement between seating clusters and the central hearth. The materials and design evoke a rustic, welcoming atmosphere suitable for social gatherings.
description: A rustic beer garden with a red-tiled roof pavilion, wooden benches, lounge seating, and a central brick fireplace on a concrete base. The layout is open and inviting, ideal for social gatherings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open pavilion with red-tiled roof, wooden beams, and visible benches and tables beneath the shelter.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the pavilion, the arrangement of lounge seating, and the prominent brick fireplace with chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brick chimney and the back of the pavilion, with the open patio area and seating visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the open side of the pavilion, more seating, and the outdoor grill area adjacent to the fireplace.
attribute_outdoor_seating_arrangement: Seating includes wooden benches and tables under the pavilion, with cushioned lounge chairs and smaller tables arranged in clusters around the central fireplace and grill. The layout is open, with ample space between seating groups.
attribute_large_communal_tables: One large wooden communal table is visible under the pavilion, approximately 2.5 meters long, seating 6-8 people.
